open_access_papers.title: Multimodal Learning With Transformers: A Survey
open_access_papers.template_use: Survey structure, taxonomy-driven related work, dense sectioning, visual overview tables, TPAMI-style synthesis.
open_access_papers.not_for: Do not copy survey taxonomy, wording, figures, or paper-specific claims.

open_access_papers.title: See360: Novel Panoramic View Interpolation
open_access_papers.template_use: Image-processing method exposition, visual-result comparison, ablation rhythm, quantitative/qualitative evidence pairing.
open_access_papers.not_for: Do not reuse images or claims without attribution and permission checks.

open_access_papers.title: Iterative Augmentation of Visual Evidence for Weakly Supervised Lesion Localization in Deep Interpretability Frameworks: Application to Color Fundus Images
open_access_papers.template_use: Medical-imaging motivation, dataset/clinical-context framing, interpretability evidence, risk-aware experimental presentation.
open_access_papers.not_for: Do not borrow medical claims, patient/data statements, or regulatory implications.

open_access_papers.title: SpaRCe: Improved Learning of Reservoir Computing Systems Through Sparse Representations
open_access_papers.template_use: Learning-systems method narrative, theoretical/method motivation, equations plus experiments.
open_access_papers.not_for: Do not reuse algorithms, notation, or equations unless properly cited and scientifically relevant.

open_access_papers.title: Fully Connected Networks on a Diet With the Mediterranean Matrix Multiplication
open_access_papers.template_use: Compact theory-to-experiment flow, mathematical contribution framing, complexity/efficiency storyline.
open_access_papers.not_for: Do not reuse method name, derivations, or benchmark interpretation as generic language.

official_templates.title: IEEE Editorial Style Manual for Authors

policy: Use bundled papers for structural study only. Do not copy text or content.
